name: Soft Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in 1/4 cup of the warm water.
2. Stir in an additional cup of warm water and the sugar.
3. Add the yeast mixture to a bowl, then add the salt.
4. Beat in the flour to form a stiff dough. Knead for 10 minutes or until elastic.
5. Place the dough in a buttered bowl and cover. Let rise for 45 minutes or until doubled in size.
6. Shape the dough into sticks or twists, about half the thickness of the finished pretzel.
7. Bring 4 cups water to boiling with the soda.
8. Drop 3 pretzels at a time into the boiling water. Boil for 1 minute or until they float.
9. Remove and drain the pretzels on buttered cookie sheets.
10. Sprinkle with coarse salt.
11. Bake at 475°F for 12 minutes or until golden brown. For extra crispness, place in a warm oven set to 200°F for 2 hours.
